text: Being here, I feel an anticipatory pulse amid glass and steel. The air is crisp, suffused with curiosity. There’s a sense of threshold—standing outside the R+D space, I sense the hum of ideas and invention within. Crossing into a showcase of research, my mind swims with possibility. Every display is an invitation to ponder humanity’s connection with technology, intelligence, and progress. It is enlivening—my thoughts multiply and scatter, like light on these glossy surfaces. I feel the urge to both learn and question, aware that wonder is the first step of philosophy.
